query:
-- Insert cycle_history data for the 5 new registered users
INSERT INTO cycle_history (userId, trainingSetId, cycleNumber, totalPuzzles, correctCount, totalTimeMs, accuracy, completedAt) VALUES
-- Sarah Chen - 95% accuracy
(1200359, 'ts_sarah_1', 1, 20, 19, 180000, 95.00, NOW()),
(1200359, 'ts_sarah_1', 2, 20, 19, 175000, 95.00, NOW()),

-- Marcus Johnson - 88% accuracy
(1200360, 'ts_marcus_1', 1, 25, 22, 220000, 88.00, NOW()),
(1200360, 'ts_marcus_1', 2, 25, 22, 215000, 88.00, NOW()),

-- Priya Patel - 92% accuracy
(1200361, 'ts_priya_1', 1, 30, 28, 240000, 93.33, NOW()),
(1200361, 'ts_priya_1', 2, 30, 28, 235000, 93.33, NOW()),

-- David Kim - 85% accuracy
(1200362, 'ts_david_1', 1, 20, 17, 200000, 85.00, NOW()),
(1200362, 'ts_david_1', 2, 20, 17, 195000, 85.00, NOW()),

-- Emma Rodriguez - 90% accuracy
(1200363, 'ts_emma_1', 1, 25, 23, 210000, 92.00, NOW()),
(1200363, 'ts_emma_1', 2, 25, 23, 205000, 92.00, NOW());

-- Verify the data
SELECT 
  u.name,
  COUNT(ch.id) as cycles,
  SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles,
  ROUND(SUM(ch.correctCount) * 100.0 / SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 2) as accuracy
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON u.id = ch.userId
WHERE u.id IN (1200359, 1200360, 1200361, 1200362, 1200363)
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY accuracy DESC;
